info.name: TSP - Test Cases
info.description: Comprehensive test cases for TSP vault setup flow including positive, negative, and edge case scenarios.

item.name: TC-01-01 Happy Path - Valid vault creation

request.description: POSITIVE: Valid vault creation with all required fields. Expected: HTTP 200/201, vaultId returned in response.
NEGATIVE: tspCode field omitted. Expected: HTTP 400, validation error indicating tspCode is required.
NEGATIVE: Empty custodianIdList. Expected: HTTP 400, error: at least one custodian required.
NEGATIVE: Run after TC-01-01. Same tspCode used again. Expected: HTTP 409 Conflict or appropriate duplicate error.

item.name: TC-01-05 Edge Case - Invalid tspCode format

request.description: EDGE CASE: tspCode with special characters. Expected: HTTP 400, validation error on tspCode format.
POSITIVE: Valid GET call. Expected: HTTP 200, transport key (hex string) returned, KCV value present.

item.name: TC-02-02 Edge Case - Key uniqueness (call 1 of 2)

request.description: EDGE CASE: First call of two to verify key uniqueness. Compare response with TC-02-02b. Expected: Distinct key values across both calls.

item.name: TC-02-02b Edge Case - Key uniqueness (call 2 of 2)

request.description: EDGE CASE: Second call to verify key uniqueness. Compare with TC-02-02. Expected: Key must differ from first call.
POSITIVE: Valid X-TV-ID header. Expected: HTTP 200, PEM/DER certificate returned.
NEGATIVE: X-TV-ID header omitted. Expected: HTTP 400 or 401, error: missing vault identifier.
NEGATIVE: Unknown vault ID in X-TV-ID. Expected: HTTP 404, vault not found.

item.name: TC-04-01 Happy Path - Valid cert and plainData

request.description: POSITIVE: Valid certificate file and 64-char hex plainData. Expected: HTTP 200, encryptedTransportKey hex string returned.
NEGATIVE: publicKeyCertificate field omitted. Expected: HTTP 400, error: certificate required.
NEGATIVE: Malformed certificate content. Expected: HTTP 400/422, certificate parse error.

item.name: TC-04-04 Edge Case - plainData wrong length

request.description: EDGE CASE: plainData is 10 chars instead of required 64-char hex. Expected: HTTP 400, invalid plainData length or format.
POSITIVE: Valid issuer with all required fields. Expected: HTTP 200/201, issuerId (UUID) returned.
NEGATIVE: KCV does not match the transport key. Expected: HTTP 400/422, KCV verification failure.
NEGATIVE: X-TV-ID header omitted. Expected: HTTP 400 or 401.
NEGATIVE: Run after TC-05-01. issuerCode 420 re-used for same vault. Expected: HTTP 409 Conflict.

item.name: TC-05-05 Edge Case - Invalid realTimePanEnrollment value

request.description: EDGE CASE: realTimePanEnrollment set to 'X' instead of Y/N. Expected: HTTP 400, validation error on enum field.
POSITIVE: Valid BIN creation. Replace issuerId with actual value from TC-05-01. Expected: HTTP 200/201, binId returned.
NEGATIVE: Non-existent issuerId. Expected: HTTP 404, issuer not found.
NEGATIVE: Run after TC-06-01. Same binValue for same issuer. Expected: HTTP 409 Conflict.

item.name: TC-06-04 Edge Case - ianLen out of range

request.description: EDGE CASE: ianLen set to 0 (invalid). Expected: HTTP 400, validation error on ianLen.

item.name: TC-07-01 Happy Path - Valid account range

request.description: POSITIVE: Valid account range. Replace issuerId and binId with actual values. Expected: HTTP 200/201, account range ID returned.

item.name: TC-07-02 Negative - Lower limit > upper limit

request.description: NEGATIVE: panLowerLimit > panUpperLimit. Expected: HTTP 400, invalid range: lower > upper.
NEGATIVE: Empty listOfExpiry. Expected: HTTP 400, at least one expiry required.

item.name: TC-07-04 Edge Case - Invalid quarter value

request.description: EDGE CASE: Quarter value Q5 is invalid (must be Q1-Q4). Expected: HTTP 400, quarter must be Q1-Q4.

item.name: TC-07-05 Edge Case - Past expiry year

request.description: EDGE CASE: Expiry year 2020 is already in the past. Expected: HTTP 400 or warning: expiry date in the past.

item.name: TC-08-01 Happy Path - Google Pay requester

request.description: POSITIVE: Valid token requestor creation. Expected: HTTP 200/201, token requestor ID (trId) returned.
NEGATIVE: tokenFormFactor '99' is not a supported value. Expected: HTTP 400, unsupported form factor.
NEGATIVE: KCV '000000' does not match transport key. Expected: HTTP 400/422, KCV verification failure.
EDGE CASE: serviceName field omitted. Expected: HTTP 400, required field missing.

item.name: TC-09-01 Happy Path - Valid token use setup

request.description: POSITIVE: Valid token use setup. Expected: HTTP 200/201, token use configuration confirmed.
NEGATIVE: trId '00000000000' does not exist. Expected: HTTP 404, token requestor not found.
NEGATIVE: merchantId '123' is too short (should be 15 digits). Expected: HTTP 400, invalid merchantId format.
EDGE CASE: Multiple merchants in merchantInfos list. Expected: HTTP 200, all merchants configured successfully.

item.name: TC-10-01 Happy Path - Valid life range

request.description: POSITIVE: Valid token life authorization setup. Expected: HTTP 200/201, token life authorization saved.
NEGATIVE: minPeriodInMonths (70) > maxPeriodInMonths (10). Expected: HTTP 400, min must be <= max.
NEGATIVE: issuerId does not exist in the system. Expected: HTTP 404, issuer not found.
EDGE CASE: Both min and max set to 0 (zero-lifetime token). Expected: HTTP 400 or 200 depending on business rule.

item.name: TC-11-01 Happy Path - Valid token range

request.description: POSITIVE: Valid token range (9100000-9999999, outside PAN account range). Expected: HTTP 200/201, token range assigned.

item.name: TC-11-02 Negative - Token range overlaps account range

request.description: NEGATIVE: Token range (1100000-9000000) overlaps existing PAN account range. Expected: HTTP 400/409, range conflict.
NEGATIVE: lowerLimit > upperLimit. Expected: HTTP 400, invalid range.
NEGATIVE: requestorId does not exist. Expected: HTTP 404, token requestor not found.

item.name: TC-11-05 Edge Case - Expiry in the past

request.description: EDGE CASE: Expiry Q1 2023 is in the past. Expected: HTTP 400, expiry must be in the future.
